menu_description:
Add anime and receive automatic episode notifications.

**📺 Anime**
➕ Add anime
📋 View anime list
🧹 Clear anime list

**⏰ Episodes**
🎯 Next episode

**📚 Information**
ℹ️ Anime details
clear_warning:
⚠️ You are about to clear this server anime list.

AnimeDBot will stop notifying new episodes from removed anime.
anime_already_exists: ⚠️ Anime is already on the list.
tracking_mode_message: 🔔 This anime will be tracked for new episodes.
library_mode_message: 📚 As this anime is finished, it has been saved only in the library.
auto_selected_season: 🤓 AnimeDBot automatically selected the most recent season for tracking.
api_problem:
⚠️ AnimeDBot is currently experiencing temporary issues with the AniList API.

Some commands may not work right now.
search_temporarily_disabled:
⚠️ Anime search is temporarily unavailable.

We are waiting for the AniList API to stabilize.
set_channel_success: ✅ This channel has been set as AnimeDBot official channel!
no_channel_set: ⚠️ This server has not set an official channel for AnimeDBot.
setchannel_instructions: Use `!setchannel` in the desired channel to set it as the official AnimeDBot channel.
